ticket.title: CALC-001: Build Calculator Web App with React
ticket.description: Create a calculator web application using React and TypeScript. Implement basic arithmetic operations, decimal support, and calculation history stored in localStorage.

recent_context.content: Completed calculator implementation. Added keyboard support so users can type numbers and operators. Tested across Chrome, Firefox, and Safari - all working correctly. Ready for deployment.
Implemented history feature using localStorage. Created useHistory custom hook to manage history state. Added History component to display past calculations. Users can clear history.

Built Calculator component and useCalculator hook. Hook handles all calculation logic (add, subtract, multiply, divide). Component renders button grid and display. Proper handling of decimals and division by zero.
Set up React + TypeScript + Vite project. Created folder structure: components/, hooks/, services/. Configured TypeScript strict mode. Installed Vitest for testing.

main.content: Create React app with Vite and TypeScript
Implement calculator logic with custom hook
